expectations.evidence: 11 ACs numbered AC-1 through AC-11, all using Given/When/Then format.
AC-1 (standard within limit), AC-2 (premium within limit)
AC-1 second scenario (standard exceeded), AC-2 second scenario (premium exceeded)
AC-6: 'When the client waits the number of seconds specified in the Retry-After header and retries, Then the retried request is accepted'
AC-2 and AC-9 cover premium 1000/min limit
AC-4 (headers on success, table format), AC-5 (headers on 429)
AC-3: Three concrete timing scenarios demonstrating window expiration at T+61s
AC-11: 'rejected with the appropriate authentication error (401/403) before rate limiting is evaluated'
